_comment: Community-maintained model routing guide. Edit to match your team's model subscriptions.

trivial.label: Trivial edit
trivial.description: Typos, spacing, comment edits — no reasoning needed

simple.label: Simple change
simple.description: Single-file edits, renames, format fixes, small bug fixes

medium.label: Medium task
medium.description: Multi-file changes, new functions, integration tests

complex.label: Complex task
complex.description: Feature implementation, debugging subtle issues, writing tests for untested code

reasoning.label: Deep reasoning
reasoning.description: Architecture design, security audits, migration planning, performance analysis
